plugins.name: discuss-and-execute
plugins.description: Discuss implementation decisions, then execute with parallel agents in coordinated waves

plugins.name: my-voice-bot
plugins.description: Generate a writing voice/style prompt for any GitHub user by mining their PR review comments

plugins.description: Search past Claude Code conversations across all projects by description, returning resume commands

plugins.name: wispr
plugins.description: Voice interaction with Claude Code via Wispr Flow dictation and macOS TTS

plugins.name: watch-pr-checks
plugins.description: Monitor GitHub CI checks for the current branch's PR. Auto-triggered after git push or gh pr create.

plugins.name: scope-review
plugins.description: Five-step adversarial scoping for a contested fix, in-flight feature, or underspecified spec.

plugins.name: opportunity-sweep
plugins.description: Scan Reddit for software market opportunities, pain points, and unmet needs.

plugins.name: diagram-workshop
plugins.description: Interactive, iterative diagram creation in the browser — force-directed graphs, hierarchies, Sankey, timelines.

plugins.name: thoughtful-terse
plugins.description: Tighten communication to senior-engineer register without losing rigor; absorb the broader concern from corrections.
